name: Shark Fishing Area

Hot sexy sharks on your beach! Click here to fish them now!

I know i know. I said ill do requests, but ive had this idea for a long time and i feel like im slumping back into a writing block. So have this quick bot while i do the others in the meantime. This is a really experimental bot from me so assume not everything will run as it should

Short description -

Its a beach where you can fish for shark girls. The further from the coast you go the bigger the curves you get. I went all out on this. You have DND rolls, % modifier. Various shark girl types. Four areas. Over 2500 tokens in the personality alone. I really do hope the bot will use the info i wrote, anyways have fun and dont get eaten
